name: Almond Puff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 1/2 cup margarine into 2 cups flour until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Add 2 tablespoons cold water and mix with a fork until well-blended.
3. Divide the dough in half.
4. Squeeze each roll between your hands until you form an 8-10 inch "snake".
5. Place the snakes on an ungreased cookie sheet and pat into rectangles about 2-3 inches wide and the width of the cookie sheet.
6. In a saucepan, combine 1 cup water and 1/2 cup margarine. Bring to a boil and remove from heat.
7. Add 2 tablespoons almond flavoring. Stir in 1 cup flour.
8. Add eggs one at a time, mixing until each is mixed in well.
9. Spread over the pastry rectangles, smoothing the top.
10. Bake at 400 degrees for 45 minutes. Allow to cool.
11. Combine 2 tablespoons margarine with confectioner's sugar, 2 tablespoons almond flavoring, and enough warm water to make a spreadable consistency.
12. Frost the pastry and sprinkle with sliced almonds (lots!). Cut into slices.
